title: Nursery Rhyme. CX. Scholastic.
content:
A diller, a dollar,
        A ten o'clock scholar,
        What makes you come so soon?
        You used to come at ten o'clock,
        But now you come at noon.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CX. Scholastic."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
